title: Value DeFi - REKT 3
relevance_summary: Incorrect use of Bancor formula in non-standard liquidity pools leading to fund drain

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls power() with baseN < baseD in the same tx
prevention.trigger: power(baseN, baseD, expN, expD) with baseN < baseD in single tx

red_flags: swap() with crafted input violating baseN >= baseD assumption
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls power() with baseN < baseD in the same tx
summary: The attack exploited incorrect usage of the Bancor formula in non-standard liquidity pools by crafting inputs that violated the baseN >= baseD assumption, allowing the attacker to drain funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
